overview: This spider belongs to the Poecilotheria genus, commonly known as ornamental tarantulas. These species are native to India and Sri Lanka and are characterized by vivid color patterns and fast movement. They are arboreal, meaning they typically live in trees rather than on the ground. Poecilotheria tarantulas are known to have potent venom compared to other tarantula species. Wikipedia 1 site Poecilotheria - Wikipedia Poecilotheria - Wikipedia. Poecilotheria. Article.
